zh.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla是Bengt Karlsson Färla和Brita Björnsdotter的女兒，出生。她和Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla是Bengt Karlsson Färla和Brita Björnsdotter的女儿，出生。她和Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Färla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jose, Juan, Carlos, Enrique, Lourdes, Ana, Arturo, Cristina, Ernesto, Guillermo, Hernan.

Spanish and Catalan: probably a nickname from Catalan falla ‘torch’ or ‘bonfire’ (in particular one which was lit in the streets of a city on public festivals), or a metonymic occupational name for one who lit such a bonfire.
Spanish: perhaps also a nickname from falla ‘flaw, error, doubt’ (from Latin falla).

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. en.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla was born as the daughter of Bengt Karlsson Färla and Brita Björnsdotter. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik.

fr.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla est née, fille de Bengt Karlsson Färla et Brita Björnsdotter. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik.

de.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla wurde, als Tochter von Bengt Karlsson Färla und Brita Björnsdotter geboren. Sie hatte mit Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla è nata il come figlia di Bengt Karlsson Färla e Brita Björnsdotter. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik.

ja.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter FärlaはBengt Karlsson FärlaとBrita Björnsdotterの娘として生まれた。彼女はSigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvikとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla(은)는 Bengt Karlsson Färla(와)과 Brita Björnsdotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla nasceu filha de Bengt Karlsson Färla e Brita Björnsdotter. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik.

ru.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla родилась. Её родителей звали Bengt Karlsson Färla и Brita Björnsdotter. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik.

es.lifeSummary: Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla nació como hija de Bengt Karlsson Färla y Brita Björnsdotter. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik.
